one_liner: Dense utilitarian marine biology reference portal covering species taxonomy, habitat distribution maps, research publications, conservation status dashboards, field guide entries, and specimen data cards; clean institutional blue-and-white grid layout with high information density, multi-level navigation, and click-triggered motion animations on interactive data visualization panels across six structured pages.

metadata.animation_target_hint: expandable specimen data card panel that slides open in-place
metadata.animation_side_effects: none — no scroll, no layout shift, no element replacement
